        <ppt-cell>API Gateway</ppt-cell>

    </ppt-row>
    <ppt-row>

        <ppt-cell>An architectural style that structures an application as a collection of services that are highly maintainable and testable.</ppt-cell>
    </ppt-row>
    <ppt-row>
        <ppt-cell>Containerization</ppt-cell>
        <ppt-cell>A form of operating system virtualization, through which applications are run in isolated user spaces called containers.</ppt-cell>
    </ppt-row>
    <ppt-row>
        <ppt-cell>CI/CD</ppt-cell>
        <ppt-cell>Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery/Deployment is a method to frequently deliver apps to customers by introducing automation.</ppt-cell>
    </ppt-row>
